featured.name: Claudia Ewing
featured.text: I had a virtual health visit with Dr. Parth Bhavsar on New Year's Eve and had an extremely positive experience. Incredibly responsive his office was — they replied within minutes and were amazingly flexible and patient. He listened carefully to my concerns and was genuinely empathetic.

featured.name: Vicki D
featured.text: Wonderful experience! Got off a cruise with a sinus infection and knew I needed antibiotics. Super easy to book, quick appointment, inexpensive, and I got my prescription the same day as well. It was really convenient for me to go this route since I was out of my healthcare network.

featured.name: DH
featured.text: It was good & I'm thankful for the service. I have a very busy life, so having easy access like this to Doctors & healthcare, from the comfort of home is amazing. Didn't feel rushed & Dr sent a needed prescription to the pharmacy right away.

featured.name: Verified Patient
featured.text: I recently had my very first telehealth experience. He has a good personality and great sense of humor, meanwhile maintains his professionalism. He is a great listener, answered all my questions. It's convenient, easy to use and affordable.

featured.name: SG
featured.text: I feel confident in your care because you are so knowledgeable and thorough, highly recommend, very professional and caring. Thank you for the speedy recovery of my mother.

reviews.name: Jesus Parga
reviews.text: I was taken care of asap very quick no hassle. Will use again.

reviews.name: Devin T.
reviews.text: Quick easy and efficient.

reviews.name: Abbey Moore
reviews.text: Great experience. Got an appointment right away for only $49 with no insurance. Doctor was cool. Gave me my meds with refills.

reviews.name: DW
reviews.text: Perfect timing and straight to the point. Felt like I got the care that was expected in a prompt and precise manner.

reviews.name: WW
reviews.text: Service was quick, efficient, and friendly, creating a sense of being well-cared for.

reviews.name: Ashley M.
reviews.text: Very nice addressed the problem quickly.

reviews.name: William T.
reviews.text: No wait, very attentive.

reviews.name: Duncan W.
reviews.text: Patient and prompt! Exactly what I was looking for, had great availability even over the weekend which was much appreciated. Felt professional and got the care I was expecting, if not exceeded my expectations.

reviews.name: Shruti Shah
reviews.text: I had an amazing experience with Dr. Parth Bhavsar. He is very thorough and knowledgeable. Setting an appointment was also easy. I'd highly recommend TeleDirectMD for quick, easy and reliable care.

reviews.name: Gautam Baid
reviews.text: Dr Parth is very helpful in understanding the issue and helps diagnose it efficiently.

reviews.name: MH
reviews.text: Dr. Bhavsar was so knowledgeable and friendly. He really takes the time to listen and explain everything clearly. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: KT
reviews.text: He was professional and friendly. He was thorough with his approach and was able to listen to me in finding a solution. I would definitely go to Dr. Bhavsar again!

reviews.name: AT
reviews.text: He even took the time to ask questions about my condition that weren't previously covered in the paperwork. Could not recommend him enough!

reviews.name: SS
reviews.text: Excellent telehealth service! Dr. Bhavsar is very knowledgeable and thorough. Dr. Bhavsar addressed the issue and sent the prescription to my pharmacy right away during Labor Day weekend.

reviews.name: Jon Allen
reviews.text: Prompt, courteous, knowledgeable professional. Would highly recommend.

reviews.name: LLE
reviews.text: Dr Parth Bhavsar Excellent quality care provided and visit is friendly and a lot of dialogue during the visit. Excellent service and highly recommend!

reviews.name: LE
reviews.text: Excellent visit with an MD. Professional and knowledgeable. Thank you.

reviews.name: Eliza
reviews.text: Fast personalized service. I had simple bladder infection and for $49 and quick turn around (only waited 1hr) for the virtual appointment, I was able to get the prescription I needed quickly to resolve the bacterial infection. I would use this service again.

reviews.name: Marcia H.
reviews.text: Doctor was great. He listened to my concerns and prescribed the medication that I needed. Meds were sent to my pharmacy within 10 minutes after the appointment ended.

reviews.name: Charles L.
reviews.text: The doctor was punctual and well spoken. The issue was addressed and I got the antibiotics I needed.

reviews.name: JW
reviews.text: My visit went well! Dr. Bhavsar was very polite and professional and was able to get me the prescription I needed. Will use again.

reviews.name: Verified Patient
reviews.text: He listened to my symptoms and immediately knew what I needed. After my visit I got my prescription and work excuse very fast and started to feel better within a few hours. 10/10.

reviews.name: Verified Patient
reviews.text: Very satisfied and glad I found Dr. Bhavsar's telehealth service. Made it super easy and simple to get the medication I needed same day.

reviews.name: MG
reviews.text: I had a great experience with Dr. Parth Bhavsar. He was really helpful, understanding, and made the whole process super easy. I got my prescription quickly and felt well taken care of.

reviews.name: TV
reviews.text: Excellent care, the doctor is very kind and attentive, everything is super comfortable.

reviews.name: Chace Hatcher
reviews.text: Dr. Bhavsar is nice personable guy. He's knowledgeable and professional, but makes the consultation comfortable. Highly recommend.

reviews.name: TD
reviews.text: He was attentive, professional. Listen to my concerns and made sure I got the best care. I would highly recommend.

reviews.name: JT
reviews.text: Great experience. Compassionate care. Highly recommended.

reviews.name: Verified Patient
reviews.text: Dr. Parth was professional, attentive, and made the visit feel easy and comfortable. He listened carefully, explained everything clearly, and prescribed medication that worked quickly.

reviews.name: UA
reviews.text: Parth is a great listener I am very satisfied with the zoom call. He took his time understanding the problem I'm having and gave a solution quickly. Recommend always!
